name: JP Badminton
nameThai: เจพี แบดมินตัน
addressFull: 300/61 Moo 12, Thepprasit Road, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Mon-Fri 08:00-22:00; Sat-Sun 08:00-21:00 according to the current linked guide. Google Maps also displays an 08:00 opening time.

booking.method: Phone; the linked guide says solo players can ask about partner finding
booking.notes: The price page is a third-party English guide linked by the Maps listing, not a clearly identified operator site. Confirm before payment.

englishEvidence: The venue's Maps-linked guide is fully in English and gives instructions for rentals, solo-player matching and coaching. Older English directories publish an email address, but no current direct English reply from the operator was found.

audience.whoShouldSkip: Heat-sensitive players should avoid the hottest daytime hours because the hall is not air-conditioned.

praise: Thai reviewers repeatedly mention clean courts and exceptionally clean bathrooms.
Players value the 12-court capacity, large parking area and unusually broad selection of drinks, snacks and simple food.
complaints: A detailed Thai review from about seven months before verification says the hall becomes extremely hot in strong daytime sun despite fans.

comparison.differentiator: Twelve courts plus the batch's clearest published equipment-rental menu and solo-player guidance.

sources.label: Google Maps location and Thai reviews
ThaiLink current price, equipment and booking guide

unverified: whether the Maps-linked ThaiLink page is operator-authorised
current relationship between the map phone and older directory phone numbers
